gcp.oracledatabase.projects.locations.ex.description: Updates a single Exadb (Exascale) VM Cluster. To add virtual machines to existing exadb vm cluster, only pass the node count.

required.description: Identifier. The name of the ExadbVmCluster resource in the following format: projects/{project}/locations/{region}/exadb

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.oracledatabase.projects.locations.exadbVmClusters.list, iterate response["exadbVmClusters"][], extract item["name"] → fill {exadbVmClusterId}

gcp.oracledatabase.projects.locations.ex.description: Deletes a single Exadb (Exascale) VM Cluster.

required.description: Required. The name of the ExadbVmCluster in the following format: projects/{project}/locations/{location}/exadbVmCluster

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.oracledatabase.projects.locations.exadbVmClusters.list, iterate response["exadbVmClusters"][], extract item["name"] → fill {exadbVmClusterId}

gcp.oracledatabase.projects.locations.ex.description: Creates a new Exadb (Exascale) VM Cluster resource.

required.description: Required. The value for parent of the ExadbVmCluster in the following format: projects/{project}/locations/{location}.
